text.title: LLM Cost Optimization Decision Tree
text.summary: Per-stage routing tree. Branches name observable inputs; leaves cite rule ids from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Has the per-stage cost dashboard accumulated ≥7 days of data (measurement_baseline_days ≥7)?

branch.when: measurement_baseline_days >= 7 AND cost_share >= 0.10 AND output_token_share <= 0.60 AND offline_ok == true
measurement_baseline_days >= 7 AND cost_share >= 0.10 AND output_token_share <= 0.60 AND offline_ok == false AND prefix_cacheable == true
measurement_baseline_days >= 7 AND cost_share >= 0.10 AND output_token_share <= 0.60 AND offline_ok == false AND prefix_cacheable == false AND model_overshoot == true
measurement_baseline_days >= 7 AND cost_share >= 0.10 AND output_token_share <= 0.60 AND offline_ok == false AND prefix_cacheable == false AND model_overshoot == false

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: measurement_baseline_days=14 → cost_share=0.55 → output_token_share=0.72 → prompt-redesign-required (ref log-output-token-share). Routing alone wouldn't help; output bloat must be cut at the prompt.
cost_share=0.15 → output_token_share=0.05 → offline_ok=true (nightly job) → route-through-batch-api (ref batch-the-offline). 50% discount applies.
